name: Steak Oriental
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Beef round steak, cut into Thin strips
1 can (8 ounces) Sliced water chestnuts, drained
1/2 pound Velveeta Pasteurized Process Cheese Spread, cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, stir fry carrots, celery, and garlic in oil for 4 to 5 minutes or until crisp tender.
2. Add steak. Cook 3 to 4 minutes, stirring constantly, until steak is tender; drain.
3. Reduce heat to low. Add water chestnuts, soy sauce, and process cheese spread; stir until cheese is melted.
4. Serve over cooked rice. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
